series_metadata.series_description: Records include copies of audit reports issued by the Auditor of State, Federal Government, CPA firms, and/or agency’s (internal) offices issuing audit and/or monitoring reports concerning evaluation reviews of program-related requirements/activities contracted with external recipients. The files also include all documentation generated while the agency’s attempt to resolve the (State and Federal) audit findings and observations. The audit findings contained within the Auditor of State (AOS) Single State Audit Report for the agency are maintained individually (i.e., each finding is considered as a separate audit/case). (Most documents are originals; some are copies.)

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office for 5 years or until all audit findings are considered resolved (by Auditor of State and Federal agencies), and provided the next audit is completed and the report is released by Auditor of state., Electronic: Erase
